name: DiamondRock Hospitality Co
summary: DiamondRock Hospitality Co (DRH) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates hotels and resorts. The company acquires, owns, and manages a portfolio of premium lodging properties across the United States. It operates under various hotel brand franchises and management agreements, focusing on upper-upscale and luxury segments of the hospitality industry.
